'''jaruru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:measter|measter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:measter|measter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jaruru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæririth|jæririth]] || [[word:jæririj|jæririj]] || [[word:jærirish|jærirish]] || [[word:jæriri|jæriri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jarururuth|jarururuth]] || [[word:jarururuj|jarururuj]] || [[word:jarururush|jarururush]] || [[word:jarururu|jarururu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jaruruth|jaruruth]] || [[word:jaruruj|jaruruj]] || [[word:jarurush|jarurush]] || [[word:jaruru|jaruru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jarufruth|jarufruth]] || [[word:jarufruj|jarufruj]] || [[word:jarufrush|jarufrush]] || [[word:jarufruf|jarufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jaruruthu|jaruruthu]] || [[word:jaruruju|jaruruju]] || [[word:jarurushu|jarurushu]] || [[word:jaruruku|jaruruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jaruruth|jaruruth]] || [[word:jaruruj|jaruruj]] || [[word:jarurush|jarurush]] || [[word:jaruru|jaruru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jaruruthul|jaruruthul]] || [[word:jarurujul|jarurujul]] || [[word:jarurushul|jarurushul]] || [[word:jarurukul|jarurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jaruruthuthu|jaruruthuthu]] || [[word:jarurujuju|jarurujuju]] || [[word:jarurushushu|jarurushushu]] || [[word:jaruruku|jaruruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jaruruthun|jaruruthun]] || [[word:jarurujun|jarurujun]] || [[word:jarurushun|jarurushun]] || [[word:jarurukun|jarurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jaruruthuoro|jaruruthuoro]] || [[word:jarurujuoro|jarurujuoro]] || [[word:jarurushuoro|jarurushuoro]] || [[word:jarurukuoro|jarurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
